description: Advanced multi-tenant analytics dashboard for understanding tenant usage patterns across the LGTM stack (Loki, Grafana, Tempo, Mimir). Provides visibility into per-tenant resource consumption, rate limiting, and cross-signal correlation.

panels.title: Active Tenants
panels.description: Total number of distinct tenants with at least one active series in the Mimir ingesters. A tenant is counted if it has any active time series currently held in memory.

panels.title: Total Active Series
panels.description: Aggregate count of all active time series across all tenants held in Mimir ingesters. This reflects the total cardinality pressure on the cluster.

panels.title: Total Log Ingestion
panels.description: Total bytes per second being ingested across all tenants via the Loki distributor. Indicates the overall log ingestion throughput for the platform.

panels.title: Total Span Ingestion
panels.description: Total spans per second being ingested across all tenants via the Tempo distributor. Reflects the overall tracing ingestion throughput.

panels.title: Active Series by Tenant
panels.description: Number of active time series per tenant held in Mimir ingesters over time. Use this to identify tenants with high cardinality and track growth trends.

panels.title: Samples Ingested/s by Tenant
panels.description: Rate of metric samples ingested per second broken down by tenant. Stacked view shows relative contribution of each tenant to total ingestion load.

panels.title: Top 20 Tenants by Active Series
panels.description: Instant snapshot showing the top 20 tenants ranked by their current active series count. Useful for identifying the heaviest cardinality contributors.

panels.title: Tenant Query Rate
panels.description: Rate of query requests per second per tenant to the Mimir query path. Stacked view shows which tenants are generating the most query load.

targets.expr: sum by (user) (rate(cortex_request_duration_seconds_count{cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace", route=~".*query.*", user=~"$tenant"}[$__rate_interval]))

panels.title: Log Bytes Ingested/s by Tenant
panels.description: Rate of log bytes ingested per second via the Loki distributor, broken down by tenant. Stacked view reveals which tenants contribute the most log volume.

panels.title: Log Lines Ingested/s by Tenant
panels.description: Rate of log lines ingested per second via the Loki distributor, broken down by tenant. Stacked view shows per-tenant line throughput contribution.

panels.title: Top 20 Tenants by Log Volume
panels.description: Instant snapshot of the top 20 tenants ranked by their log bytes ingested per second (5m rate). Identifies the largest log producers in the platform.

panels.title: Tenant Log Query Rate
panels.description: Rate of log query requests per second per tenant to Loki query endpoints. Stacked view shows which tenants generate the most log query load.

targets.expr: sum by (tenant) (rate(loki_request_duration_seconds_count{cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace", route=~".*query.*", tenant=~"$tenant"}[$__rate_interval]))

panels.title: Spans Received/s by Tenant
panels.description: Rate of spans received per second by the Tempo distributor, broken down by tenant. Stacked view shows per-tenant trace ingestion contribution.

panels.title: Trace Bytes by Tenant
panels.description: Rate of trace bytes received per second by the Tempo distributor, broken down by tenant. Stacked view shows per-tenant trace data volume contribution.

panels.title: Top 20 Tenants by Span Volume
panels.description: Instant snapshot of the top 20 tenants ranked by their span ingestion rate. Full-width view for identifying the largest trace producers across the platform.

panels.title: Rate Limited Requests by Tenant
panels.description: Rate of samples discarded due to rate limiting per tenant. A rising trend indicates tenants hitting their configured ingestion rate limits and losing data.

targets.expr: sum by (user) (rate(cortex_discarded_samples_total{cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace", reason="rate_limited", user=~"$tenant"}[$__rate_interval]))

panels.title: Tenant Active Series vs Limits
panels.description: Comparison of each tenant's actual active series count against their configured maximum global series limit. When series approach or exceed the limit, ingestion will be throttled.

targets.expr: max by (user) (cortex_limits_overrides{cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace", limit_name="max_global_series_per_user", user=~"$tenant"})

panels.title: Loki Discarded Lines by Tenant
panels.description: Rate of log lines discarded by Loki per tenant and reason. Common reasons include rate limiting, line too long, and stream limit. A rising trend indicates tenants hitting their configured limits.

targets.expr: sum by (tenant, reason) (rate(loki_discarded_samples_total{cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace", tenant=~"$tenant"}[$__rate_interval]))

panels.title: Ingestion Rate vs Limit
panels.description: Comparison of each tenant's actual sample ingestion rate against their configured ingestion rate limit. When the actual rate approaches or exceeds the limit, samples will be dropped.

targets.expr: max by (user) (cortex_limits_overrides{cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace", limit_name="ingestion_rate", user=~"$tenant"})

panels.title: Tenant Resource Heatmap
panels.description: Consolidated multi-signal table showing each tenant's resource consumption across all LGTM signals: active metric series, log bytes per second, spans per second, and queries per second. Merge-by-tenant transformation correlates data from Mimir, Loki, and Tempo into a single view for cost attribution and capacity planning.

title: Multi-Tenant Analytics — LGTM Stack
